entry.title: Dynamicland, Intro, August 2024
entry.quote: 6-minute introduction to Dynamicland and communal computing.

entry.title: Intel Honesty
entry.quote: Here is the fundamental problem facing Intel, and by extension, U.S. dreams of controlling leading edge capacity: there is no reason for Intel Foundry to exist. Apple, Nvidia, AMD, and other leading edge fabless chip companies rely on TSMC, and why wouldn’t they?

entry.title: What happens when you touch a Pickle to an AM radio tower?
entry.quote: 'what would happen if you ground a hot dog to one of your AM radio towers?' He didn't know, so one night on the way to my son's volleyball practice, we tested it. And it was awesome.

entry.title: How Machines Learned to Discover Drugs
entry.quote: The natural world contains many billions of potential medications. The question is how to find the ones that work.

entry.title: The Work You Do, the Person You Are
entry.quote: The pleasure of being necessary to my parents was profound. I was not like the children in folktales: burdensome mouths to feed.
